name: Rum Toddy
description: A warm rum toddy made with BACARDÍ Carta Oro, hot water, honey, and lemon. From crisp nights to après ski, this Hot Rum Toddy warms you up with its Caribbean heat. A comforting cocktail, it's perfect for cosying up with close friends.
recipe_steps: Pour hot water into a tempered glass mug.
Squeeze the lemon wedge into the water, add honey, and stir until the honey is dissolved.
Add BACARDÍ Carta Oro gold rum, and stir gently.
Garnish with a cinnamon stick and a lemon slice.
searchable_text: Rum Toddy main rum BACARDÍ Carta Oro A warm rum toddy made with BACARDÍ Carta Oro, hot water, honey, and lemon. From crisp nights to après ski, this Hot Rum Toddy warms you up with its Caribbean heat. A comforting cocktail, it's perfect for cosying up with close friends. ingredients 50 ml BACARDÍ Carta Oro rum, 100 ml hot water, 12.5 ml honey, 1 lemon wedge(s) recipe steps Pour hot water into a tempered glass mug. Squeeze the lemon wedge into the water, add honey, and stir until the honey is dissolved. Add BACARDÍ Carta Oro gold rum, and stir gently. Garnish with a cinnamon stick and a lemon slice.
